fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. New schema field: required_states (list of state names a ticket must pass through before reaching done). 2. Schema field: allowed_workflows (list of named workflow paths, each a sequence of states). 3. Per-ticket override: ticket.toml can set required_states or workflow to constrain transitions. 4. validate_workflow() checks that a ticket has visited all required states before allowing transition to done. 5. Default workflow: new->ready->in-implementation->in-review->done. 6. At minimum in-review is always required before done.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Per-ticket workflow paths: required_states field
